name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project

---

**Contribution Guidelines**

Before filing an issue, please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/lestrrat-go/helium/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md).

**Abstract**

Please describe concisely what you want to accomplish, including prerequisite information.
If the problem is clear, design and implementation discussion is much faster.

**Describe the proposed solution/change**

Please attach a standalone Go test/code snippet that shows the behavior you want.

If it is a behavior change, include a failing (or would-be failing) test case.
If it is a structural/API change, please still provide near-valid code that shows intent.

**Analysis**

Please describe alternative solutions you considered and the trade-offs.

**Additional context**

Add any other context, references, or screenshots here. Please delete this section if unnecessary.
